description: BlaBlaCar is a travel platform focused on shared mobility, including long-distance carpooling and transport services. On the `blabla.tech` domain, the public machine-consumable surface found is an MCP server endpoint.
summary: BlaBlaCar exposes a public MCP server over SSE at `https://mcp-app.mcp.prod-1.blabla.tech/mcp?token=…`; no other public developer integration surfaces were found on `blabla.tech`.
